title: The Ulti Modpack
description:
In this modpack you can play on vanilla servers as well as normal private worlds!

When you start a world you will get pushed into a survival situation in which you choose what your character is via the origin mod.
body:
In this modpack you can play on vanilla servers as well as normal private worlds!

When you start a world you will get pushed into a survival situation in which you choose what your character is via the origin mod. From there you pick a class, which will be one of the origin classes, but after that the journey is all up to you! Will you be an adventurer who will save the world, or a homebound trader looking for profit? Or will you be a humble poltergeist ready to destroy your enemies by becoming the blocks around them with your possession ability?
